tree.name: Jarace Walker
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: IND traded Bilal Coulibaly (7th pick) to WAS; WAS traded Jarace Walker (8th pick) and a 2029 2nd round pick to IND; PHX traded a 2028 2nd round pick to IND; PHX traded Chris Paul, Landry Shamet, cash, and multiple picks to WAS; WAS traded Bradley Beal, Jordan Goodwin, and Isaiah Todd to PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#7)
assetsGivenUp.note: IND's own 7th overall pick, drafted Coulibaly then traded to WAS
